subcodes.first_line: O My loved ones! The birds are in their nests while the Chosen One is in the hands of the wicked. Take heed, O ye who are endued with insight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احبائی ان الطیور فی الاوکار و المختار فی ایدی الفجار فاعتبروا یا اولی
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @rejection, opposition and persecution
